programme.title: Muhammad Ali | Sucker punch: small town boxing in rural America
programme.desc: Guardian boxing correspondent Kevin Mitchell and columnist Gary Younge reflect back on the life and career of the self-proclaimed greatest boxer of all time, Muhammad Ali. | Rough N Rowdy offers local hopefuls, most with limited skills and little training, the chance to win $1,000 and make a name for themselves in the boxing ring.

programme.title: Can women save sumo? The crossroads facing Japan's national sport
programme.desc: The ancient Japanese sport of sumo is in well-documented crisis. Years of controversy and scandal have hurt the sport's ability to attract new talent. But new energy is brewing in Tokyo's Ryōgoku district, where the sport is slowly adapting to life in the 21st century, and where - despite being banned from the professional ring itself - women are flocking to watch it like never before. Will it be enough to save Japan's national sport in the 21st century?

programme.title: Beirut Dreams in Color
programme.desc: Mashrou' Leila were one of the biggest bands in the Middle East, with a lead singer, Hamed, who is the most prominent openly gay rock star in the Arab world. Known globally, their gigs were regular sell-out successes until an event at their 2017 Cairo concert changed everything. Playing to 35,000 people, the band looked out at a sea of swaying flickering lights, including an Egyptian fan flying a rainbow flag. This simple act would later be described by authorities as ‘inciting debauchery', and ultimately catapulted the band, the fan and others into a tragic series of events.

programme.title: The Age of Stupid revisited: what's changed on climate change? | My mission to understand insomnia
programme.desc: The Age of Stupid revisited: what's changed on climate change? | Why can't I sleep? My mission to understand insomnia

programme.title: Working nights to pack your California strawberries, working days to graduate from school
programme.desc: Ashley Solis is a Mexican American teenager, farmworker and factory worker who dreams of being the first in her family to graduate from high school and go to college. Her mother is undocumented, and like many families with mixed documented status, they face the threat of family separation. With responsibility for earning enough to look after her sisters, Ashley balances working nights in a California strawberry-freezing factory with her school attendance.

programme.title: The Wolf Dividing Norway
programme.desc: With unique access to remote communities in the snow-capped landscape of Norway, this film follows characters on either side of a fierce debate on whether to cull the wolf population. For decades the topic has split political parties, families and communities across the country, with environmentalists world-wide criticising Norway for how it handles its tiny population of critically endangered wolves. .

programme.title: Dear Bradford: a love letter to a misunderstood city
programme.desc: From Muslim ‘no-go areas' to Brexit-voting white nationalists, stereotypes continue to be perpetuated about Bradford 21 years after the 'race riots'. Farhaan was born in the city in the 1980s to a family of south Asian Muslim heritage. From a young age he feared being ‘found out' and lived a dual existence, moving away from Bradford as soon as he could. He spent years travelling the world and teaching English. But, when the coronavirus pandemic hit, Farhaan was reluctantly forced to return to his hometown. Through his beloved grandma, or 'Amma', and the poetry of his late grandfather, Farhaan learned how to love Bradford – and himself.

programme.title: The Fight
programme.desc: People with disabilities are among the most discriminated against in Bolivia. Fed up with being ignored, a group of them march across the Andes to the seat of the government in La Paz, asking to speak to President Evo Morales. They are met with riot police, barricades, teargas and water cannon.

programme.title: Little Warrior
programme.desc: Johana Gómez, 10-time and reigning amateur featherweight boxing champion, is determined to pull herself and her family out of extreme poverty in Venezuela. Like Gómez, more than 75% of the Venezuelan population lives below the poverty line due to the ongoing economic crisis there. Through a chance online connection with Scottish boxing trainer Gary Young, locked down in Edinburgh, Gómez's hopes of reaching her potential start to take shape - despite the language barrier.

programme.title: A Childhood on Fire
programme.desc: When Nick Hurndon was six years old he and his two older brothers were set on fire by their stepfather in their San Francisco home. Now in his early forties, Nick is a retired Marine and is raising two sons that are about the same age he was when he was set ablaze. This is a film about childhood trauma and the effects that abuse had on his sense of self worth, and the ways in which one man is interrupting a cycle of violence so that his two sons can thrive

programme.title: Meet the people fighting to keep Ireland's abortion ban | Peterloo: A massacre that changed Britain
programme.desc: Meet the people fighting to keep Ireland's abortion ban | A massacre that changed Britain: does Peterloo still resonate today?

programme.title: America's soccer migrants: the US footballers crossing Mexico's border
programme.desc: Despite President Donald Trump's rhetoric about Mexicans crossing the border to the US, American soccer players such as Omar Gonzalez are heading south for new opportunities, more money and a better standard of football. The Guardian travels to Pachuca, Torreón and Guadalajara to speak to top clubs, US immigrant players and Mexico legend Jared Borgetti – who find the prospect of a border wall at odds with the reality of the two nations' interdependent relationship

programme.title: Fighting addiction on Pine Ridge reservation
programme.desc: Whiteclay, Nebraska is a tiny unincorporated town that sits on the border with South Dakota. Until its closure by state officials, its four liquor stores sold more than 4m cans of beer a year, almost entirely to members of Lakota Sioux tribe on the Pine Ridge Indian reservation, where the sale of alcohol is banned. The Guardian spent time on the reservation to understand the impact of alcohol on its residents – and the activists and Lakota tribe members determined to keep the town closed

programme.title: Trapped in a city of a thousand mountains
programme.desc: A new phenomenon has taken the internet by storm: Chinese rap. But behind its skyrocketing popularity, there is a struggle for freedom of speech. Rappers try to figure out what they can and cannot say after more censorship is announced. In Chongqing, one of China's biggest cities, surveillance is unavoidable. Announcements echo across the vast squares warning that “morally suspect individuals” are banned from speaking in public.

programme.title: Desert Fire
programme.desc: Football's world cup for unrecognised territories is viewed through the eyes of the manager and players of one of the most fascinating teams, Iraqi Kurdistan.

programme.title: How to fix space's junk problem | Too black for Brazil
programme.desc: No TV, no sat nav, no internet: how to fix space's junk problem | Too black for Brazil

programme.desc: Mitch falls for a beautiful woman he doesn't know is both a princess and an assassination target.

programme.title: Thief Trackers
programme.desc: Reality series following stolen possessions. The undercover thief tracker team uses GPS technology to follow a criminal who steals a camera and passes it to an accomplice.

programme.title: Ill Gotten Gains
programme.desc: Crime bosses and drug dealers living the high life have their assets stripped by financial investigators and then sold at auction.

programme.title: Ill Gotten Gains
programme.desc: One of Britain's largest ever drug seizures leads to a Proceeds of Crime auction, and elite financial investigators hunt down suspected drug dealers.

programme.title: Ill Gotten Gains
programme.desc: A gang is foiled trying to smuggle deadly weapons in to the UK, then their boat is sold at a Proceeds of Crime auction.

programme.title: The Mafia With Trevor McDonald
programme.desc: For the first time on British television, Trevor McDonald takes viewers on an immersive journey into the American Mafia gaining close access to people who have experienced firsthand the money, glamour and violence of the United States' most famous organised crime network. Travelling to cities across the United States, Trevor gets inside the lives of people on all sides of the Mafia story, many of whom have never spoken on television before. From ‘made' men who have risen to the heights of power to ruthless killers who have pulled the trigger on the orders of their bosses, Trevor meets men – and their families – who today live in shadow of their time in the Mob.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: While working a con on a corrupt County judge in an outlying desert town, the team gets caught in the middle of a bank robbery... and Nate and Sophie are taken as hostages, along with their mark.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: When the downtown church of Nate's former priest – and childhood best friend – is about to be razed by a profiteering real estate developer, the Leverage team must steal a miracle in order to save it. But as the story progresses, the question becomes: "who exactly is saving whom?"

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: The Leverage crew goes after a Serbian adoption agency that's scamming money from desperate American couples looking to adopt needy war orphans. To entrap the ringleader and rescue the children, the team must hijack the local production of an independent horror movie.

programme.title: Dragons' Den CA
programme.desc: In business, it's all about the pitch – that elusive ability of an entrepreneur to stand tall, talk smart, and capture an audience whenever and wherever opportunity knocks. Each week, with big investment dollars on the line, real-life business owners must pitch like a pro under the dead-eyed scrutiny of five self-made business titans, known as 'The Dragons'. Succeed in this high stakes environment and the reward could be life changing, as the aspiring entrepreneur not only secures financing but the prestige of a coveted Dragon as a mentor and partner. Sold in every continent, Dragons' Den shows viewers around the world the inspiring stories of hard-working business owners and the transformational power of entrepreneurship.

programme.desc: In business, it's all about the pitch – that elusive ability of an entrepreneur to stand tall, talk smart, and capture an audience whenever and wherever opportunity knocks. Each week, with big investment dollars on the line, real-life business owners must pitch like a pro under the dead-eyed scrutiny of five self-made business titans, known as 'The Dragons'. Succeed in this high stakes environment and the reward could be life changing, as the aspiring entrepreneur not only secures financing but the prestige of a coveted Dragon as a mentor and partner. Sold in every continent, Dragons' Den shows viewers around the world the inspiring stories of hard-working business owners and the transformational power of entrepreneurship.

programme.title: The Birth Of Industry
programme.desc: The Birth of Industry: Tony heads out on a 40-mile walk through the wild, dramatic and romantic Peak District - the place where the Industrial Revolution began.

programme.title: The Tudor Way
programme.desc: The Tudor Way: Tony Robinson takes a 45-mile hike through the beautiful countryside of the Weald in Kent and East Sussex, discovering its rich and surprising Tudor heritage.

programme.title: Battle In The Glens
programme.desc: Battle In The Glens: Tony takes a tough four-day trek through the Kintail region of the Highlands to discover the incredible story of the Jacobite Uprisings of the early 1700s.

programme.title: The Path To Stonehenge
programme.desc: Tony Robinson heads off for a 45-mile walk across Wiltshire to tell the story of life and death in the last centuries of the Stone Age His route takes him through the greatest concentration of prehistoric sites in Europe.

programme.title: Romans In The Lakes
programme.desc: It was 30 years after the Romans invaded Britain that they were ready to take on the challenge of conquering the Lake District. Tony Robinson tracks their 50-mile walk from Penrith past Ullswater to Ambleside and on to the Irish Sea at Ravenglass.

programme.title: Smuggler's Cornwall
programme.desc: In the late 18th century, there was a sure-fire way to earn a living along the Cornish coast: smuggling. The great walking country is home to tiny secretive harbours, beaches and secluded coves which were once ideal for the infamous illicit imports.

programme.title: Wigan Pier
programme.desc: Setting off from Liverpool, Tony takes a three-day walk inland to Wigan, tracing the story of the Leeds and Liverpool Canal's chaotic construction and its dramatic impact on the development of Lancashire.

programme.title: The Dark Age Of Northumbria
programme.desc: Tony Robinson sets off on his most curious walk yet, across the ancient and turbulent kingdom of Northumbria In the seventh century, at the height of the Dark Ages, the rule of Northumbria stretched from Edinburgh to York.

programme.desc: World-renowned restaurateur Gordon Ramsay puts 18 more hopeful chefs through their paces as they battle for the head chef position at one of his top Las Vegas eateries. The series kicks off with Gordon testing the contestants' discipline levels at a US Army training facility. Then, it is survival of the fittest as the chefs are tasked with putting together their signature dish in just 45 minutes. During their first dinner service, the two teams cook for VIP guests Nolan Gould and Erica Ash.

Debbie Gibson stops in for a mani/pedi and Katie gets invited to host a gifting suite at Sundance but things soon take a horrible turn.

programme.title: Nail Files
programme.desc: Nail expert Katie Cazorla and her best friend Amy narrowly escape death on the way to Sundance where Katie is hosting a gifting suite for celebrities. Once at the festival, Katie's publicist fails her at every turn. Back in Los Angeles, Katie's assistant in Los Angeles drops a bomb, leaving Katie crying in a restaurant parking lot. Katie tests out her rhyming skills when rapper Too $hort comes in for a pedicure.

programme.title: Nail Files
programme.desc: Katie's fiancé Walter gets nominated for a Grammy so Katie must find a red carpet dress that will make her stand out in a sea of A-list celebrities! Then after her assistant quits, Katie must bring in a professional organizer to help deal with the mess she left behind.

programme.title: Nail Files
programme.sub-title: Walter's Big, Fat Russian Birthday Party
programme.desc: Katie throws Walter an authentic Russian party to celebrate his 53rd birthday but gets bruised up when planning the ultimate surprise. At the salon, Katie awakens her inner gymnast when actress Candace Cameron Bure (“Make it or Break It”) visits the salon. Plus, tensions boil when one of the technicians is accused of stealing tips.

programme.title: Homemade
programme.desc: In new Lynn, Ida and Karl and their two young children have just moved into a classic 1950's home, still in it's original condition. With no money or time left for to renovate, they're calling in the HOMEmade cavalry.

programme.title: Homemade
programme.desc: In Puni, Christine and Grant are desperate to get their house in shape now they have two generations coming back home to roost. Do the HOMEmade team have what it takes to give this property a much-needed new lease of life, or could this be the renovation that breaks them?

programme.title: May the Best House Win
programme.desc: Homeowners in Nottingham compete to win a cash prize for the nicest home. Jewellery designer Plum kicks things off with her modern three-storey house. Comic enthusiast Daniel Hewson, who changed his name by deed poll three years ago to Emperor Spiderman Gandalf Wolverine, shows off his lad's pad in the upstairs conversion of a 1960s bungalow. Croupier Tomasz Wisniewski loves all things red. And a gothic experience awaits at the semi-detached home of artist Zoe Taylor.

programme.title: May the Best House Win
programme.desc: There are some spooky moments in North Wales today. Well-travelled gran Jean Morgan Roberts lives in a Spanish-style detached house with stunning views over the Menai Straits. Landlady Debbie Crew welcomes the guests to her haunted 17th century pub. Textile artist Sian Jones has filled her detached home with artistic creations and ornaments, and there are more ghostly goings on at the converted police station home of former cop Nigel Williams.

programme.title: May the Best House Win
programme.desc: Four more homeowners get a chance to peek around each other's properties in the north east of England, beginning with Andria's Georgian farmhouse. Customer service worker Holly has put her stamp of hearts and words on her new build town house, while animal lover Vivienne opens up her Victorian school house in Durham which she shares with three horses and four dogs. Housewife Tracey also has a detached Edwardian house with a menagerie of animals, including Benji the Shetland pony.

programme.title: Trails & Trailblazers: Cross-Country Road Trip
programme.desc: Join pilot Ariel Tweto as she flies to unexpected places along the trails and wild spaces of America, meeting trailblazers in science, history, and exploration along the way.

programme.title: USA Through Food
programme.desc: A journey through the USA, through the diverse food scenes of six vibrant cities.

programme.title: New England
programme.desc: Philippe explores the unique beauty of New England. He travels to New Hampshire where he discovers the reason why leaves turn colors in the Fall ventures to the beautiful and rugged Acadia National Park in Maine and visits Napatree Point in Rhode Island, a barrier island that is always changing due to erosion.

programme.title: Ocean Exploration
programme.desc: Philippe visits the famous Woods Hole Oceanographic Institute in Massachusetts and finds what discoveries they've recently made under the sea travels to the Florida coast to observe the health of the coral reefs and goes to Maui, Hawaii to explore the power of massive waves with the help of a professional surfer.

programme.title: Plants
programme.desc: Philippe travels to the Poconos of Pennsylvania to discover a variety of plants explores a lush forest and uncovers edible plants and visits a laboratory that has made groundbreaking discoveries in the way plants communicate.

programme.title: Tides
programme.desc: Philippe looks at the impact of tides. He travels to the Delaware Bay salt marsh visits the Pamlico Sound in North Carolina where high tides are dramatically eroding the coastline explores fascinating tide pools in Hawaii and witnesses the amazing Bore tide in Alaska, which arrives so quickly that people can actually surf on it.

programme.title: Backpacking Utah's Canyon Country
programme.desc: Eric explores Utah's breathtaking slot canyons on a multi-day backpacking adventure.

programme.title: Backpacking Durango, Colorado
programme.desc: Eric travels to the mountain towns of Durango and Telluride, Colorado to explore the backcountry by ski, snowshoe, and ice axe.

programme.title: Into America's Wild
programme.desc: Step off the beaten path and connect to your inner trailblazer in this cross-country journey to some of the most beautiful but little-known landscapes of North America. Into America's Wild is a non-stop ride via kayak, train, bike, hot air balloon and more that explores the transformational allure of wild places and the human connection we all share with the natural world.

programme.title: Canyons
programme.desc: Philippe visits the Grand Canyon in Arizona explores Bryce Canyon in Utah and learns about its fascinating hoodoos and dives into the Monterrey Bay in California and discovers an incredible underwater canyon that features unusual sea creatures.

programme.title: Colors of the Earth
programme.desc: Philippe explores incredible and unexpected colors around the USA. He visits spectacular red rock formations in Sedona, Arizona walks on red, black and green beaches in Hawaii and discovers hot springs that produce brilliant colors due to heat-loving micro-organisms in Yellowstone National Park.

programme.title: Cheese Days
programme.sub-title: Rattlesnake Roundup - Last Barber Pole Company - Living in a 727 - Mustard Museum - Rock In the House
programme.desc: Will finds an abundance of lactose-tolerance at Cheese Days Festival in Monroe, Wisconsin observes snake milking at the world's largest Rattlesnake Roundup in Sweetwater, Texas investigates America's last remaining Barber Pole factory in St. Paul learns the challenges of living in a retired 727 jet in Hillsboro, Oregon samples condiments at Middleton's National Mustard Museum and visits the ultimate Roadside Attraction: Rock In the House in Fountain City.

programme.title: Neon Boneyard
programme.sub-title: Hangover Heaven - Farmacia Botanica - Deke Slayton Space & Bicycle Museum - Art Car Parade
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Will pays homage to the iconic signs of yesteryear at the Neon Boneyard, and then witnesses a miracle cure at Hangover Heaven samples the potions, hexes and voodoo dolls at Farmacia Botanica in Los Angeles browses the rockets and sprockets at the Deke Slayton Space & Bicycle Museum in Sparta then joins the revved up crowd at America's largest Art Car Parade in Houston.

programme.title: Dr. Aditi Nerurkar
programme.desc: Dr. Aditi Nerurkar is a doctor and global public health expert who specialises in stress, resilience and burnout. She discusses everything from the need to create digital boundaries, to why multitasking is a myth.

programme.title: Morgan Housel
programme.desc: World-renowned financial expert and best-selling author Morgan Housel walks us through ‘the psychology of money', answering questions such as how much is enough, how much we should save, and more.

programme.title: Neil deGrasse Tyson
programme.desc: Neil deGrasse Tyson is one of the world's greatest science communicators, with an infectious passion that led to his impressive career, and his quest in raising global knowledge of space, the universe and beyond.

programme.title: Mo Gawdat
programme.desc: With an extensive career in places like IBM, Microsoft and eventually Google, ex-Google officer, entrepreneur and writer Mo Gawdat unveils the dangerous side to AI. Gawdat discusses the use and mis-use of AI over time.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: With final assembly finished, the 1970 Rallye Red 'Cuda is ready to be fired up and driven before its maiden voyage, the crew takes a look back at this car's journey of restoration.

programme.desc: The Copper X-Prix continues in Antofagasta, Chile with action from the Semi-Finals. Francisco Oliveira explores the Atacama Desert and it's unique environment.

programme.title: The Electric Odyssey
programme.desc: The Energy X-Prix continues in Punta del Este with action from the Semi-Finals. The drivers visit a nearby windfarm to learn about Uruguay's renewable energy transition.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: The 1970 Challenger in B7 Blue owned by the Amentinis is finished and ready to be revealed. See every moment of its restoration, from dead to resurrected and detailed to the way it left the factory floor. This is what Graveyard Carz lives for.

programme.title: Backpack Tel Aviv, Israel
programme.desc: Sabrina visits Israel and first explores Sarona, its local market, tries local food and wine. She later learns about Jewish settlements in Tel Aviv. She also visits Jaffa and explores its old buildings and flea market and ends with Shakshuka Shushka, a traditional dish.

programme.title: City Breaks Bundi
programme.desc: Bundi casts a spell on Asmita, when she goes there for a minibreak. She discovers that this forgotten 14th century town in Rajasthan is a treasure waiting to be explored. Right from its mural-filled palaces and tranquil lakes to its narrow lanes with blue houses and its ornate stepwells, she finds herself basking in the romance of the town that takes her back in time.

programme.title: 10 Days South Africa Cape Town
programme.desc: Alex Outhwaite travels to South Africa to know more about its history, and while there, experiences a hoard of things that she had never done before.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun Banff, Canada
programme.desc: Alex Drobin escapes to the rugged beauty of Banff, Canada's first national park, where he explores the Cave and Basin National Historic Site, goes to Bow Valley Parkway to spot wildlife and has a cowboy experience at Banff Trail Riders. He also tries smoked buffalo flatbread and beer from a local brewery.

programme.title: City Breaks Jaipur
programme.desc: A quick escape to Jaipur introduces Asmita to the stark contrast in the old and new sides of Rajasthan's capital city. On the one hand, she has a tryst with the global cosmopolis that attracts business and luxury travelers from all over the world. On the other hand, the regal monuments of the region reveal to her the stories of the kings who built them.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun Dubai 1
programme.desc: Alex explores Dubai from Burj Khalifa, tries a traditional Emirati platter, visits the gold market and enjoys at teg Mall of Emirates and ends with a camel safari and camping that night.

programme.title: Backpack Caesarea, Israel
programme.desc: Sabrina visits Zodiac fountain, Jaffa Port followed by exploring the National Park in Caesarea, Roman theatre built by King Herod and concludes her trip after her visit to the shrine of Bab, learning about the Baha'i faith.

programme.title: 10 Days South Africa Durban
programme.desc: Alex Outhwaite takes a helicopter ride over Drakensberg mountain, and explores the untouched wilderness of Kagga Kamma Nature Reserve.

programme.title: Rucksackreisen Acre, Israel
programme.desc: Sabrina visits Acre and explores El Jazzar mosque and Citadel fortress. She also enjoys her time in Mizpe Hayamim where she learns about organic farming and then explores the town of Capernaum and Mount of Beatitudes Church.

programme.title: 10 Days South Africa Kruger National Park
programme.desc: Alex Outhwaite has once-in-a-lifetime experiences at Kruger National Park, and sees a tribal music and dance performance in Johannesburg.

programme.title: Great World Hotels Amansara 1
programme.desc: On her travels across Cambodia, Sukhmani is lost in the wonders of Angkor, the archaeological park that transports her to the era of the Khmer empire.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun Dubai 2
programme.desc: Alex has varied experiences in Dubai like trying Lebanese cheese bread, visiting a coffee museum, exploring Hatta village, going to IMG Worlds of Adventure.

programme.title: Great World Hotels Amansara 2
programme.desc: Sukhmani is on a break in Cambodia, where she gets to stay at a resort, which used to be the royal guest house.

programme.title: Vet On The Hill
programme.desc: Do rounds at a zoo with a Bengal tiger and a donkey in need of risky procedures.

programme.title: Vet On The Hill
programme.desc: Follow a cat with an eye condition and two canaries looking for a better life.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: View groundbreaking pooch-neutering surgery and a turtle who's way off track.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Cheer for a lame golden retriever and say hello to a sweet dog-loving eccentric.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: Join a family's hunt for a shepherd, hound, or doodle that can match their pace.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: Dive into the hunt for a retriever or dachshund made for a water-loving family.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: Cozy up to three Lab-mix rescue dogs, who show off their energy and lovability.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: Choose sides in a mother-daughter tug-of-war over their family's first canine.

programme.title: Hope For Wildlife
programme.desc: Join the team through moments of celebration, anxiety, and reflection.

programme.title: ER Vets
programme.desc: Study a pup's strange fainting spells and see if surgery helps a dog walk again.

programme.title: ER Vets
programme.desc: Meet a cat who can't turn right, a snaggle-toothed pup, and a dog with seizures.

programme.title: ER Vets
programme.desc: Face a gator who can't open wide and meet a pooch with a traumatizing itch.

programme.title: Cambodia's Monarchy
programme.desc: King Sihanouk retired in 2004, giving way to his son, Sihamoni - a ballet dancer. Unlike many monarchies, Cambodia's is not hereditary - rather the next king or queen mother is chosen by the National Assembly from a pool of eligible candidates. When Sihamoni was chosen, what sort of monarch were they hoping to crown?

programme.title: Princess Diana: In Search of Happiness
programme.desc: The definitive portrait of the 20th century's most remarkable woman: Princess Diana.

programme.title: Harry: The Mysterious Prince
programme.desc: Who is the 'real' Prince Harry?

programme.title: Royals And Animals: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: This film documents extraordinary relationship with Windsors and their animals

programme.title: Queen Victoria's Letters: A Monarch Unveiled
programme.desc: This is the story of Queen Victoria as never heard before a psychological insight of the woman told through her own words, her experiences recounted solely through her personal diaries and letters.

programme.title: Extraordinary Royal Wedding
programme.desc: For most mothers, organising any wedding is stressful enough. But what if you are also an Australian born Royal Princess and expected to supervise complex Hindu traditions stretching back centuries?

programme.title: The Princes of Sayn-Wittgenstein-Berleburg
programme.desc: They are among the largest private forest owners in Germany.

programme.title: FashionTV Global
programme.desc: FashionTV L'Original

programme.title: FashionTV Global
programme.desc: FashionTV L'Original

programme.title: Weekend At Halberts
programme.desc: Party time in Knighton! The mood is down so the King decides to throw a party. In the meantime Jestro attacks the Fortrex, but he is confronted with the new NEXO Power "The Wedgie of Doom". Clay is turned to stone and everyone is gloomy. Especially King Halbert. In order to get everything in a better mood Aaron organizes a celebration. The King wants a reenactment of Clay's heroic rescue of the Queen. He is (as usual) totally unaware of Clay's situation. In order not to disappoint him further, the Knights get a remote control for Clay's Battle suit and is thus able to “perform” as Clay. Lance is happy to exercise his acting abilities and quickly gets into the role of the uptight knight of knights. Ava is working on reinstalling Merlok 2.0 into the Fortrex with Robin. She is also preparing the Fortrex for a visit from the new Knights' Academy novices. It is a fieldtrip with Principal Brickland and Sir Griffiths with the goal of teaching the kids about these new so-called High-tech battle strategies. Not really feeling it for anything modern, it quickly turns into a regular trip back memory lane for Brickland and Sir Griffiths. This out of control excursion is an excellent moment for Jestro who is looking for an opportunity to cheer up the defeated Monstrox. Unfortunately, for Jestro, Ava is able to make Merlok 2.0 functional again, and the Novices are able to fight Jestro and his monsters off using the NEXO Power: Wedgie of Doom. It is a humiliating defeat. Apparently, this is just what the doctor ordered for Monstrox. A good laugh at someone else's expense. His evil mood is back on.

programme.title: Awakening
programme.desc: When Mateo's comic creation, Z-Blob, follows him from a dream back to Brooklyn, Mateo and his sister realize the Dream World is real, and in danger!

programme.title: Dream Chasers
programme.desc: After a daring mission to save their friend in the Dream World, Mateo and Izzie find the nightmare has followed them back to the Waking World.

programme.title: Legacy, Vehicle and Mechs
programme.desc: Zane takes help from Nya for backup memories of their adventures to the Samurai X Cave computer, but Zane encounters a mysterious puzzle buried deep within his code. Nya digitizes Jay and uploads him into Zane's mind. Jay reviews memories of the Ninja's various motorcycles, mechs and planes in order to solve the vehicle-themed puzzle.

programme.title: The Oni And The Dragon
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi learns to adjust to the life of a Ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks at Mystake's Tea house, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon biker gang. Remembering that Lloyd managed to arrest one of the gang members at Borg Tower, the Ninja decide to interrogate him to ascertain the location of the third Oni Mask. In order to get him to talk, however, Cole suggests they visit MYSTAKE'S TEA HOUSE to obtain some "truth tea." The truth-tea backfires spectacularly when Cole accidentally switches cups and drinks the tea himself. Zane is able to salvage the situation, however, and obtains a lead. He learns that the Sons of Garmadon frequent a karaoke bar called LAUGHY'S. Zane and Cole don disguises to infiltrate the bar. Cole assumes the alter ego “Rocky Dangerbuff," while Zane adopts the subtler moniker "Snake Jaguar." In order to earn the gang's trust, Cole performs a karaoke routine that is a smash success. Unfortunately, during the routine, his disguise comes loose and he is exposed as a ninja. The Sons of Garmadon attack him, and Zane (who is still in disguise) is unable to intervene. Cole is taken prisoner while Zane is invited back to the Sons of Garmadon's secret base.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Spooky Sensation
programme.desc: The girls decided to spend a weekend at the hotel. It appears to be haunted. Watch the full video to know more about this.

programme.title: Sings of Love
programme.desc: See how Stephanie and Olivia enter the Under the Sea photo competition. Jacob wrote a love song! Olivia and her friends are very excited to hear. Tanya and Stephanie are teamed up in baking class. Watch the video for more fun.

programme.title: Video Wonder
programme.desc: Olivia and Andrea visited science camp with Mrs Stevens. On the other hand, Andrea and Mia decides to return a lost skunk to nature. Andrea was reading intimate postcards between Chef Pierre and Mrs. Stevens.

programme.title: Stiix and Stones
programme.desc: The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply so the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks – and when they fail to make enough cash, the Ninja decide to steal it – but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but when the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply, the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks. Meanwhile, reluctant to give up being Samurai X, Nya struggles to embrace being a Water Ninja, and Sensei Wu gives her a riddle to figure out. Back at Stiix, when the Ninja fail to make enough cash working the docks, the Ninja decide to steal it... but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. After Moro gets away with the scroll, the Ninja are left dangling, but Ronan saves them at a price – for a piece of their share in the Tea Farm.

programme.title: Public Enemy Number One
programme.desc: The Ninja must find out as much as they can about Nadakhan before he finds the Realm Crystal to save his crew, but after the Ninja are labeled enemies by the world they used to protect, our heroes find themselves hunted by their old friend, Ronan. With the Destiny's Bounty impounded, the police hire Ronin to track down the fugitive ninja. Misako has been arrested and is confronted by Nadakhan, who reveals he has trapped Wu in the Teapot of Tyrahn. Misako accidentally reveals the location of the Realm Crystal. The ninja discover that Wu was researching djinn when he disappeared and split up to learn more about their potential new foe. Lloyd and Zane head to the Library of Domu. While there, Ronin hacks into Zane's systems and shuts him down, then captures Lloyd. Ronin uses Zane's SOS beacon to lure Kai and Nya into the desert, where they are captured. Later, Cole and Jay are defeated by Ronin as well. Meanwhile, Nadakhan has used his powers to foil the high-tech security guarding the Realm Crystal and steals it. The ninja are hauled off to Kryptarium Prison and Nadakhan is free to gather his lost crew.

programme.title: Enkrypted
programme.desc: Falsely imprisoned, the Ninja are at their lowest point, but find an unlikely friend in an old enemy. Meanwhile, Nadakhan rescues his marooned crew and gains a new perspective, along with a new mysterious plan. With the ninja imprisoned, Nadakhan uses the Realm Crystal to free his old crew. The ninja encounter Captain Soto, the first captain of the Destiny's Bounty, who tells them the story of how he originally trapped Nadakhan in the Teapot.The secret, he says, is the venom of a Tiger Widow, a rare creature that lives on only one island. The venom can slow a djinn down. Soto is the only one who knows where the island is and will only tell if the ninja break him out of jail. Meanwhile, Nadakhan has decided to return to his home realm of Djinjago, only to discover it is falling apart. The ninja's destruction of the Cursed Realm is affecting the realms connected to it. Nadakhan uses the Djinn Blade to smash the Teapot, absorbing all the spirits that were trapped there into the sword.Nadakhan vows revenge on the ninja and NINJAGO. The ninja and Soto escape from jail, only to find out the map to the island is on Nadakhan's ship. Nadakhan discovers that Nya looks just like Delara, his long-lost love.

programme.title: Misfortune Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja are on a collision course to find the map to stop Nadakhan, they first must find him. Meanwhile, Jay makes a wish to change his future, but it could alter his past indefinitely. The ninja's search for Nadakhan's ship turns up nothing. Nadakhan's crew is struggling to handle an airship which used to sail only on the oceans. Nadakhan confronts Jay and talks him into making a wish that will win him Nya. Jay wishes that he wasn't born in a junkyard and was rich. The next moment, he receives a letter saying his father has died and he has inherited his estate. Jay rushes home to find his parents in the junkyard and finds out they are fine, but they reveal that he is adopted. Jay discovers that his real father is the actor who played his favorite movie hero. In an effort to trap the ninja, the Sky Pirates start raids all over NINJAGO City. Nadakhan kidnaps Kai, who makes two wishes, both of which go wrong. His third wish is to “make it all go away.” Nadakhan's first mate, Flintlocke, accidentally destroys the Realm Crystal and Cole steals Soto's map. The Destiny's Bounty mysteriously vanishes from the police impound yard.

programme.title: The Cloud
programme.desc: A storm is brewing over Knighton. Monstrox has taken the form of a cloud, and is raising an army of lightning infused Stone Monsters. His first target is the new Lavalands Amusement Park. Harmony reigns in Knighton as the Knights pursue their civilian lives: Lance has a TV talk show Axl is the singing chef on the show Jestro is the weatherman Clay is teaching at the Knights' Academy Macy, Ava and Merlok 2.0 travel the land in the Fortrex making sure the kingdom's defenses are ready (part of a plan she and Clay have) Aaron and his hover shield is travelling the land setting extreme records. Robin is at his workshop at the Knights' Academy doing an “independent study” – he's working on some top secret project for Merlok 2.0. It all seems excellent! We even see the Knights new vehicles – which have been optimized for civilian life (except for Clay's.) But storm clouds are brewing. Well, one storm cloud is brewing: the Cloud of Monstrox! Yes, the Book of Monsters has reconstituted himself and is now a cloud who needs a man on the ground to enact his new evil plan. He follows his old buddy Jestro as he goes across the realm on the weekends apologizing for being evil. ZAP! With one bolt of his evil magic lighting, the Cloud of Monstrox turns Jestro evil again (only this time a bit, well, too evil.) The evil duo are back together – and bring stone to life for the first time in the form of Gargoyles from the town of GHOULIA. Now they must gather the Forbidden Powers so that the Cloud of Monstrox can destroy the entire kingdom! A battle breaks out in the Lava Lands, where Lance and Alice Squires are reporting from the opening of the Cuthbert Richmond funded Lava Lands Amusement Park, rebuilt from the remains of Jestro's old HQ. Jestro and the Cloud are after something in the remains and as Merlok 2.0 sends out a call for the Knights to help Lance. Can Lance (with an assist from King Halbert in his Mech) hold-off Jestro, the Cloud and their new army of stone fighters?!

programme.title: A Little Rusty
programme.desc: The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro unlocks a mysterious Forbidden Power. What kind ofhavoc will they unleash? And can Merlok 2.0 and the NEXO KNIGHTS make the new COMBO NEXO Powers work? The Knights finally make it to the Lava Lands – using their various new forms of transport, which are all strictly civilian vechicles – and they must regroup and learn to fight together again to face the new threat of Jestro, the Cloud of Monstrox, and their STONE MONSTERS (in this case, Stone Gargoyles.) But Jestro and his monsters beat back the knights and recover the STAFF OF MONSTROX – which was buried under the ceremonial chamber from Episode 210 (and is now the Lava Puker amusement park ride) – and they get away on Jestro's EVIL MOBILE, which he recovers from the HQ garage. Macy says this is exactly why she's been touring the kingdom preparing everyone for the next attack. The Knights have to get it together because now the entire kingdom is under threat…again. Robin decides he must upgrade the Knights' vehicles and make them more “fight optimized.” Ava and Merlok 2.0 must figure out how to use new NEXO Powers because regular NEXO Powers do make Stone monsters back into stone, but the Cloud simply zaps them to life again. Meanwhile, in the IRON MOUNTAINS, Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox find the first of the Forbidden Powers: RELENTLESS RUST. They find the ROGUL STATUE holding the power and zap him to life. Now…they can rust those shiny knights to pieces! Ava and Merlok are attempting to use NEXO COMBO POWERS – with hilarious results – as they try to figure out how they might work. When Jestro attacks, he's able to halt the Fortrex by instantly rusting its tracks and wheels! Robin has his hands full trying to clean all the rust from the attack of Relentless Rust. As the Knights attempt to defend against Jestro, the Cloud is zapping statues to life. He hits a statue with a bolt of lightning as Clay is touching it. Something happens…Clay feels odd stiff as if rock is mixing with his body. Finally, Ava and Merlok 2.0 download to the Knights their new thing: a COMBO NEXO COMBO Power. It works! It can smash the animated statues to dust! They use it to defeat Jestro, but he and the Cloud get away with the Forbidden Power of Relentless Rust. Victory … sort of. Clay talks to Merlok 2.0…something has happened to him. What can they do? Merlok 2.0 is very concerned.

programme.title: Thunderstox
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox encounters the sculptor. He helps unleash a horde of fierce garden gnomes on Knighton. What will the NEXO KNIGHTS do against this new enemy? Will their new COMBO NEXO Powers do the trick? As Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox head off on the Evil Mobile to 'store' the Forbidden Power in a secret location, they encounter…THE SCULPTOR. His real name is ROBERTO ARNOLDI. He's a sensitive and odd artist who has been laid off by the king (the King ordered a "smashing" statue of the Queen, and the Sculptor made a statue of the Queen literally smashing monsters. He takes everything very literally.) Jestro instructs him to make a "bad" statue that he can use to attack the knights. The Sculptor sets to work. Meanwhile, the NEXO KNIGHTS are discussing the COMBO NEXO Powers, the Forbidden Powers, and what all this means. Lance, meanwhile, decides that since his talk show career is on hold, he thinks he'll install cameras in the Fortrex and do a Big Brother-like expose show on the Knights (he decides NOT to tell the others.) Merlok 2.0 and the Cloud of Monstrox (each talking to their cohorts) explain the history of the Forbidden Powers: it's a history lesson about the WIZARDS' COUNCIL, the Forbidden Powers, and how they were stopped long ago. This visual montage leads Jestro to…MOUNT THUNDERSTROX. The Cloud of Monstrox shows him the circle of ten Standing Stones where he will insert the Forbidden Powers. "What'll happen after that?” asks Jestro, curious. "Oh, I don't want to spoil the surprise," says the Cloud. They insert the first Forbidden Power, Relentless Rust, and it locks into place on its stone. They go off to battle the Knights and collect the "bad" statue the sculptor is making. But he's made a literally bad statue…it's terrible ... garden gnomes. Like an amateur art student. And…it's not even finished. ("You can't rush bad genius!") The Knights attack with their newly modified vehicles and they succeed in destroying the Evil Mobile. They then try to use a COMBO NEXO Power, but can't…it had to be perfect to work (Ava and Merlok need to work on it.) As Jestro and the Cloud retreat, Merlok again talks to Clay about turning to stone! Merlok calls in Robin…he will need him to build something to help Clay as he becomes more and more impaired.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Ratchet thinks back on the time that he spent in the Autobot-Decepticon War.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bumblebee faces off against the newest villain, Nanosec.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bumblebee and Bulkhead are having fun celebrating their first-ever Halloween with Sari.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bulkhead realizes that Sari's newest toy is really evil. Unfortunately, none of the Autobots believe him.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and Bumblebee square off against Skyquake.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bulkhead, Bumblebee and Ratchet scramble to eliminate a swarm of Scraplets that have invaded Autobot.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: An old friend of Bulkhead visits him. When his buddy arrives things are not as they seem.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots assist Agent Fowler in transporting a hazardous explosive device.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Miko and Bulkhead head to Greece on a field trip to recover an Energon Harvester.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots and Decepticons begin to malfunction.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Spike and Carlee are stranded on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron blocks all radio waves and communications on Earth and makes his demands clear.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: A Decepticon Raider in King Auther's Court
programme.desc: Starscream inadvertently activates a time machine.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Decepticons trick the population into believing they are "Sky Gods".

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots hijack and reprogram the mighty Devastator against the Decepticons.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfic Games: The Smurfs discover the spirit and joy of friendly competition when they hold their first "Smurfic Games". After a near miss with the troublesome cat Azrael, the Smurfs decide they need to get into better shape. Papa Smurf suggests that the Smurfs tone their bodies as well as sharpen their athletic abilities by inaugurating the "Smurfic Games".

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Fountain Of Smurf: The Smurfs discover a fountain of youth that is guarded by a wicked troll, who steals Papa Smurf's magic book. They convince Gargamel to help them and the greedy villain runs to get the water, but manages to fall in with the troll. As the two chase each other all over the countryside, the Smurfs are able to retrieve Papa Smurf's book.

programme.title: The Abominable Snowbeast
programme.desc: Brainy and his friends organize a journey to Ice Mountain to pick the rare snow flower for Papa Smurf. They meet a terrifying snow beast that befriends them, due to Smurfette's kindness, and helps them find the tiny flower.

programme.title: The Trojan Smurf
programme.desc: Gargamel, the evil wizard, has devised a new plan to capture the Smurfs: he builds a giant statue in the shape of Papa Smurf. Thus, he hopes, the Smurfs are going to drag the statue into their Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Unsound Smurf: In an effort to give Papa some quiet time, Brainy uses one of Papa's spells to create a magical sound barrier around the village. Papa cannot reverse the spell and sends the Smurflings, who are trapped outside the Village, to a noisemaker. Baby takes a bottle of sound from the noisemaker, which breaks the barrier.

programme.title: Smurf Box Derby
programme.desc: Handy Smurf makes another invention: the Smurfmobile. Each Smurf has his – or her – customized vehicle and all, or almost all, the Smurfs enjoy a little spin... But then the evil wizard Gargamel gets hold of the idea and starts making trouble for the Smurfs...

programme.title: The Bad Place
programme.desc: What is this little moon coming from above? Why, it's a crater-pockmarked globe of mud inhabited by the Grimeys, a family of mud-splattering, mud-eating creatures from out there in the sky. Not all the Smurfs are enthusiastic about the visitors....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Bigmouth's Friend: Gargamel and Balthazar command a giant robot to force King Gerard to hand over Clockwork Smurf. When the robot is about to destroy the castle, Clockwork's new, large, and awkward friend Bigmouth defeats the robot. Clockwork is hurt in the battle but Handy fixes him and implants a voice box so he can say "Hi"!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Crooner Smurf: Harmony Smurf is no longer wanted in the Smurf Choir: his singing is too far off-key. But Papa Smurf gives him an amulet that will make him a vocal virtuoso. Now here comes Hogatha...

programme.title: He Who Smurfs Last
programme.desc: Jokey's practical jokes go too far when Chlorhydris is the victim of one. She gets her revenge on the Smurfs by creating a spell to steal their sense of humor. Grouchy, who had no sense of humor to begin with, breaks the spell by getting back the humor potion.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sassette: Snappy and Nat steal Gargamel's formula to make another Smurf – a female to be a companion to Smurfette. They create Sassette, who causes mischief wherever she goes. Papa uses his Smurfiness Solution to turn Gargamel's evil Sassette into a playful Smurfy Sassette.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Every Picture Smurfs A Story: The evil Maestro's magical paints have the power to transport his models onto canvas – forever! Papa Smurf directs Painter to switch his paints and before long, Maestro is enshrined in a picture next to his dream girl, Smurfette.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Master Smurf: There is an evil power in the Titan's crown that Miner Smurf finds underground. And Greedy Smurf is the Smurf to fall victim to it. Then Gargamel comes up with some new schemes to destroy the Smurfs, and everything gets hopelessly tangled.

programme.title: Have You Smurfed Your Pet Today?
programme.desc: The Smurfs get so involved with Handy's new toy that they forget to feed Puppy. Gargamel lures Puppy into a cage with food and holds him for ransom – the Smurfs' magic secrets. The Smurflings distract Gargamel with the toy long enough to rescue Puppy and they vow to never neglect him again.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Papa's Worrywarts: Papa Smurf's worries make him break into a rash of worrywarts. The only way to relieve him of his bout of indecision-inducing disease is to have him rub the horn of a Wartmonger, a sloppy, slimy, stupid and brutal enemy of the Pussywillow Pixies...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Hovel Is Not A Home: In his search for a grander hovel, Gargamel looks in the Great Book of Spells to conjure up a new home. But all of his spells backfire and that convinces him that there's no place like home!

programme.title: Jokey's Joke Book
programme.desc: Jokey Smurf's joke boxes are no longer funny to the other Smurfs. Jokey finds new ideas in his Great Joke Book, but these ideas are even less popular in the Village. And here comes the evil Gargamel with a few jokes of his own...

programme.title: Essence Of Brainy
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf is not the same anymore. He is polite, considerate, modest and calls every other Smurf Sir or Madame. All the Smurfs are worried that Brainy has lost all that makes his personality. They ought to be worried, for Brainy has been the victim of a system called an Essence Remover that Scruple, Gargamel's apprentice, uses... But Brainy's essence is coming back!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Never Smurf Off Till Tomorrow: A fierce wind carries the Smurfs' windmill away, with several Smurfs inside. Is Lazy Smurf really at fault or is an injustice being committed? Are the captive Smurfs going to be saved from the volcano's crater? Is Brainy going to smurf up his mouth for a moment?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurf On Wood: The evil wizard Gargamel once again meets Esmeralda, the gypsy fortune-teller, and she finds a novel way of getting the gold coin that Gargamel imprudently shows her. But the Smurfs in their turn are tricked into believing there is such a thing as a good-luck tree...

programme.title: Stop & Go
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and the Teletubbies play a round and round game. They watch some children playing stop and go. Then they play a Ready, Steady, Go game round and round Home Hill.

programme.title: Strawberry Picking
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are having some Tubby Custard when they stop to watch some children who are going strawberry picking.

programme.title: Swan
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have trouble getting out of bed. The Teletubbies watch Andy Brown and some children feeding swans.

programme.title: Swim with Stephanie

programme.title: Urban Birds
programme.desc: Andy Brown and some children feed some birds and watch them playing on the bird table. In Teletubbyland, it's timer for Tubby Custard, but Dipsy spills his all over a Tubby Seat. No-one wants to sit in the Tubby Custard, so Noo-Noo tidies it up.

programme.title: Wake Up
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play a game before watching some children playing a game with Alex Pascall. The Teletubbies have fun playing the game of waking and sleeping, before Tubby Bye-Bye.

programme.title: Shadows

programme.title: Sophie Art
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have fun sliding down into Home Hill. They watch some children painting circus pictures before the Lion and Bear appear in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Air Bud: Spikes Back
programme.desc: It's summertime in Fernfield, but thirteen-year-old Andrea Framm is less than thrilled to be out of school. Her best friend Tammy is moving to California, and Connor, the new boy who just moved in next door, can't quite fill her shoes. While babysitting to raise money for a trip to visit Tammy, Andrea has a brainstorm – Andrea and Buddy's Pet Sitting Service! All goes well until the dogs get out and wreak havoc on the Fernfield farmer's market. Andrea's plans – and her savings – are down the tubes!

programme.title: Return to Oz
programme.desc: In the vein of the well-loved family favourite, this enchanting story of friendship and love is a fun-filled adventure! Emerald City is in danger again and it is down to Dorothy and her loyal dog Toto to save Magic Land. With the help of Scarecrow, the Tin Man and Lion, they must defeat the wicked toy-maker and his army of wooden soldiers after he steals a magic book which he uses to grant wishes that will destroy the people of Magic Land. Together they set out on a treacherous adventure to restore happiness in Emerald City.

programme.title: Ladybug
programme.desc: Uplifting and moving family fun! Courageous seven-spotted ladybug Rube escapes his laboratory home and scales new heights on a quest for the legendary bug utopia Golden Canyon, with the help of worldly dragonfly Master Water. However, on arriving at Golden Canyon, he is dismayed to find it's a construction site! Rube and his new friends must band together to re-build their magical homeland. A heart-warming, magical tale of courage, hope and friendship.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs find a baby dragon that has gotten lost in the forest. They take it back to the village and look after it. But wicked Gargamel manages to capture the poor creature and plans to use it to destroy the Smurf village. Luckily Papa Smurf has more than one trick up his sleeve.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Lazy dreams he is on Paradise Island and free from all the work Papa Smurf inflicts on him. His fantasy turns into a nightmare that sends him eagerly back to work once more. | Brainy and his friends organize a journey to Ice Mountain to pick the rare snow flower for Papa Smurf.

programme.title: Corneil & Bernie: Panic on Board
programme.desc: John and Beth have gone away on vacation but miss Corneil so much they ring Bernie and ask him to bring Corneil to join them. There's only one slight problem: Corneil reveals he has a phobia of flying. A fear that is not helped when the pilots mysteriously fall asleep mid flight…

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Directing the Smurfs to finish repairing the dam, Papa Smurf takes off on a herb-hunting expedition. | Because of Jokey's pranks, none of the Smurfs believe him when he tells them that Azrael the cat is ready to pounce on them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Dreamy's wish of becoming an Astrosmurf comes true when Papa Smurf puts him to sleep, magically transforming the landscape and the Smurfs into a space fantasy. Gargamel keeps a close watch on their antics through his crystal ball, but he too falls victim to Papa Smurf's magic and is sent into a thunderstorm.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: April Smurfs Day | The Magic Stick
programme.desc: April Smurf's Day turns out to be not so funny when Gargamel dons a smurfberry bush disguise to capture the happy little Smurfs. | With a borrowed recipe from Homnibus, Papa Smurf creates a magic stick that Clumsy takes and loses in the woods.

programme.title: Monk Little Dog

programme.title: Eliot Kid

Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate

But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh ZEXAL S2 E37

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh ZEXAL S2 E38

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Athena gets Gnasher envy when seeing a pampered version of Gnasher in a magazine and when she hears that Dennis owns an Abyssinian wire-haired tripe hound (Gnasher), she wants him. However, being an owner to Gnasher isn't all cracked up to be! Followed by 'Splash'

programme.desc: Dennis makes a line of practical jokes for Mr. Scrimp, called 'The Menace Collection.' However, Dennis soon learns that it will put Mr. Har Har out of business.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Walter takes up origami as a martial art, Dennis scoffs and comes up with his own martial art, and so the two prepare to battle it out. Followed by 'Smelling of Roses'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After watching a film about an alien invasion, Dennis, Curly and Pie Face decide to make their own film. However, Walter stumbles across them filming, and he only sees the action, not the camera. Filming what he sees on his mobile phone, he runs to tell the whole of Beanotown about the alien invasion. As panic spreads, Dennis and his friends discover the chaos and decide to keep filming in order to help make the best of their own alien film. Meanwhile, Sergeant Slipper investigates the alien landing that Walter has seen, and discovers the truth—that the spaceship is a playhouse with glow sticks in it. Followed by 'Castle in the Air'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: For a school project, Dennis and Walter both build robots. However, during an accident, both robots merge, causing Dennis and Walter to defend the school. Followed by 'No Joke.'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: With one backstage pass for a Ratbucket gig, Dennis and his friends pass themselves off as Ratbucket, only for the real Ratbucket not to be able to play at his own concert. Followed by 60 second Dennis and 'Bad Dad'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Dennis breaks his bike, Dad is unable to afford a new one, so Dennis convinces him to ask his boss for a raise. Unfortunately, Mr Scrimp reduces his wages instead. Dennis then trashes his house to convince Scrimp that his family are poor, so that Mr Scrimp will feel compelled to raise Dad's wages. Just as Scrimp has been taken in by Dennis' plan, Mum and Dad arrive home laden with shopping bags, resulting in Dad getting fired on the spot. Dennis resolves to get Dad his old job back by secretly causing chaos at his office. To restore order Scrimp rehires Dad, sealing the deal with a generous pay rise. Mum and Dad repair the house, but still don't have enough money to buy Dennis a new bike, instead it gets repaired with Dad's office rubber bands and paperclips. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dennis Hiccups'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher

programme.title: Challenge Squad
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers, Jack and Joy, awaken together to discover they've gotten married following a night of debauchery in Sin City, and one of them has won a huge jackpot after playing the other's quarter. When a judge refuses to have the marriage annulled, the newlyweds devise ever-escalating schemes to undermine each other and get their hands on the money – only to find themselves falling in love amid the mutual backstabbing.

programme.title: Mad Families
programme.desc: Focuses on three families – one Hispanic, one African American, one Caucasian – who find themselves sharing the same camping space on a Fourth of July holiday weekend. When none of them volunteer to vacate the site, they decide on a series of competitions to determine a winner.

programme.title: Kids In America
programme.desc: A diverse group of high school students band together to peacefully stick it to their overbearing principal.

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Valentin is Acapulco's resident playboy, until a former fling leaves a baby on his doorstep and takes off without a trace. Leaving Mexico for Los Angeles to find the baby's mother, Valentin ends up finding a new home for himself and his newfound daughter. An unlikely father figure, Valentin raises Maggie for six years, while also establishing himself as one of Hollywood's top stuntmen to pay the bills, with Maggie hilariously acting as his on-set coach. But their unique and offbeat family is threatened when Maggie's mother shows up out of the blue, and Valentin realizes he's in danger of losing his daughter - and his best friend.

programme.title: Waiting for Anya
programme.desc: From the mind of world-renowned author Michael Morpurgo comes the cinematic adaptation of Waiting for Anya - a powerful and authentic true story of a young shepherd that had a key part to play in one of the world's most shocking moments in history. Based on the novel by the author of War Horse, Waiting for Anya follows the story of Jo Lalande, a thirteen-year-old shepherd living in the mountain village of Lescun. Though Europe may be ravaged by the horrors of World War II, Jo's world in the French Pyrenees has remained remarkably untouched. That is, until a ferocious encounter with a bear introduces Jo to the mysterious Benjamin, a Jewish refugee who is desperately awaiting the arrival of his missing daughter, Anya, before making his escape across the border. Making friends with Benjamin and his mother-in-law Horcada, an isolated widow who lives in the nearby mountains, Jo becomes aware of a very dangerous secret - the family are involved in smuggling Jewish children over the mountains to the safety of Spain. In a heroic act of defiance, Jo promises to assist Benjamin in his endeavours...but soon becomes embroiled in a perilous conspiracy when German troops make their descent upon the village. Filmed in the village of Lescun and the surrounding Aspe Valley, France in which the true to life story also originated, the film boasts an all-stellar cast including Noah Schnapp (Stranger Things), Academy Award Winner Anjelica Huston (Ever After, The Addams Family), Jean Reno (Leon, The Big Blue, Ronin), Frederick Schmidt (Mission: Impossible - Fallout), Thomas Kretschmann (The Pianist, Central Intelligence) and Nicholas Rowe (Riviera, Lock Stock and Two Smoking Barrels).

programme.title: Queen of the Desert
programme.desc: A chronicle of Gertrude Bell's life, a traveler, writer, archaeologist, explorer, cartographer, and political attach for the British Empire at the dawn of the twentieth century.

programme.title: Call of The Wild
programme.desc: Call of The Wild is a modern-day story incorporating elements of Jack London's classic short novel. Whilst Ryann (Ariel Gade) is staying with her Grandpa Bill (Christopher Lloyd) a wild hybrid wolf/dog shows up injured on the back porch one night. Ryann and a local friend believe they can train the magnificent animal to become a sled dog leader but first they must try and persuade Grandpa, who knows the animal will eventually have to return to the wild. Then they must stand up to the local bully who wants to claim the dog as his own.

programme.title: Henry V
programme.desc: King Henry V of England is insulted by the King of France. As a result, he leads his army into battle against France. Along the way, the young king must struggle with the sinking morale of his troops and his own inner doubts. The war culminates at the bloody Battle of Agincourt.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The Green Hornet: Disaster Rides the Rails
programme.desc: A newspaper publisher and his Korean servant fight crime as vigilantes who pose as a notorious masked gangster and his aide.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.
