programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Renegade: Broken on the Wheel of Love
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.title: Anything Is Possible
programme.desc: Ethan Bortnick plays the leading role as Nathan, a young boy who's separated from his mother when she goes missing during a trip to Japan to help after the tsunami. The movie explores issues like homelessness, military family life and adoption. Ethan co-wrote the music with Grammy award winning songwriter and producer, Gary Baker and will also score the entire film. Ethan will become the youngest actor to co-write the soundtrack and play the leading role in a feature film.

programme.title: Valentina
programme.desc: Valentina and her friends are fun-loving, teenage girls. They shop, they have sleepovers and they dream about their first true love. When they decide to throw a spring bonfire party, they never expected it would turn into such an adventure!

programme.title: Lena and Snowball
programme.desc: Bullied at school and lonely at home, Lena keeps hoping she'll have a true friend someday. One afternoon, her dreams come true - in the shape of a cuddly white lion cub. Lena tries to keep playful Snowball out of trouble, but the clumsy poachers who kidnapped the valuable cub, and the cruel trophy collector who paid for him, are desperate to get him back. As Lena races to rescue poor Snowball, her new friend Jake will do anything to help. Be careful, or Snowball will melt your family's heart.

programme.title: Spirit Riders
programme.desc: When a rebellious teen is arrested and sentenced to an equine therapy camp, she forms a connection with a spirited thoroughbred that she helps train with the guidance of the ranch's no-nonsense owner.

programme.title: Tom's Midnight Garden
programme.desc: A young boy journeys across the boundaries of reality to a secret, haunted place, half-a-century back in time, in this tale of enchantment, shadows and lost memories.

programme.title: Lights, Camera, Romance
programme.desc: Actress Emma Hutton is determined to help find her friend Hope a perfect match but in doing so, she accidentally tramples on several hearts. When Emma realizes she herself has always loved her good friend Gray, Emma learns love works best when she doesn't meddle with it. A charming romance inspired by Jane Austen's "Emma."

programme.title: My Birthday Romance
programme.desc: A woman tired of her parents nagging her to find a boyfriend makes a deal with a guy who also doesn't want a relationship to pose as her boyfriend to keep her family off her back until after her birthday party.

programme.title: Silver Wolf
programme.desc: A ranger and his 16 year old nephew struggle to save a wolf from a rancher who is out to kill it.

programme.title: My One True Love
programme.desc: When 2 of the 3 things a fortune teller predicts come true, Ali wonders about the 3rd - finding true love with a man named John. Drawn to a fireman whose name isn't John, does she trust destiny or her heart?

programme.title: The Capture
programme.desc: A badly injured fugitive explains to a priest how he came to be in his present predicament.

programme.title: God Made Them... I Kill Them
programme.desc: A bounty-hunter (Dean Reed) is hired by the residents of a small town on the Mexican border to stop a series of gold robberies by marauding outlaws who are coordinated by the town's corrupt banker.

programme.title: Daniel Boone, Trail Blazer
programme.desc: Daniel Boone leads settlers to Kentucky, but must fight Shawnee Indians who have been convinced by a French renegade that Boone and the settlers are there to kill them and steal their land.

programme.title: Buffalo Bill in Tomahawk Territory
programme.desc: Buffalo Bill tries to protect the Indian's land from a gang who want to get the gold buried there.

programme.title: $100,000 for a Killing
programme.desc: $100,000 for a Killing - Johnny Forest, bounty hunter, attempts to carry out his mother's dying wish that he bring in his outlaw brother, Clint, alive.

programme.title: 2 Years of Love
programme.desc: Samantha has a great marriage, until the pressure to have a baby comes up. Things get tricky when she starts falling for one of her clients, not realizing it is secretly her husband. Will they be able to make it through this rough patch?

programme.title: All She Wishes
programme.desc: When sardonic high school senior Sophie O'Dea inherits her neurotic grandmother's car, an old automobile named Star, she is told the car has magical powers.

programme.title: Hearts & Vines
programme.desc: A builder and decorator on a home renovation show end up quarantined during the holidays in the home they are renovating.

programme.title: Dance-Off
programme.desc: "Dance-Off" tells the story of two rival dance studios whose star-crossed lovers, Brandon and Jasmine, must compete against each other for $25,000 and the top award, the Platinum Platinum.

programme.title: Ozzy
programme.desc: When his family goes on vacation, a young dog finds himself at a dog prison where he must escape with the help of his new friends.

programme.title: Legends of Oz: Dorothy's Return
programme.desc: Legends of Oz: Dorothy's Return finds Dorothy waking up to a devastated post-tornado Kansas. She must rush back to Oz to save her old friends the Scarecrow, the Tin Man, the Cowardly Lion, Glinda the Good Witch and the entire Land of Oz from the devious brother of the Wicked Witch of the West – The Jester. With Dorothy as their only hope to restore order and happiness to Emerald City, she must battle through a magical journey with Toto at her side and some new friends to help her find her way.

programme.title: Detective McLean
programme.desc: Allison and Devin investigate the death of a high-powered CEO. Meanwhile, Cameron and Mariah's mother, Jackie comes home from rehab.

programme.title: Detective McLean
programme.desc: Allison and Devin uncover the shocking truth at the heart of a turf war in Crestview. Later, Allison and Matt take the entire family to visit Tim in prison and Jackie, feeling jealous of the way Cameron looks up to Allison, makes a tragic choice.

programme.title: Kill Thy Neighbour
programme.desc: When Julie's husband dies, she moves cross-country to rebuild her life with son Matty and build a closer relationship with her late husband's sister, Alison. Yet Alison blames Julie for her brother's death and has a plan to become Matty's mother...no matter who gets hurt in the process.

programme.title: Vaniglia E Cioccolato
programme.desc: Penelope, a mother of three kids, gets tired by the infidelities of her husband and leaves him. She goes to live at her grandma's house, while he has to take care of the children. His interest is awakened when he finds love letters held by his wife, indic

programme.title: Variety Lights
programme.desc: A beautiful but ambitious young woman joins a traveling troupe of third-rate vaudevillians and inadvertently causes jealousy and emotional crises.

programme.title: Vengeance Is Mine
programme.desc: Chronological exploits of Iwao Enokizu, a murderous thief on the lam.

programme.title: Viridiana
programme.desc: Viridiana, a young nun about to take her final vows, pays a visit to her widowed uncle at the request of her Mother Superior. Regarded by many as Buuels crowning achievement while the Spanish government suppressed the film on the grounds of blasphemy and obscenity. A despairing picture of the dark cavern of the human heart.

programme.title: Legendary
programme.desc: Cal Chetley is a bright, engaging, undersized fifteen year-old who's been picked on most of his life. Cal joins his high school wrestling team in the hopes his brother will train him. More importantly, Cal uses wrestling as the tool to reunite his family.

programme.title: Shortcut to Happiness
programme.desc: A down-and-out writer sells his soul to the devil in exchange for fame and fortune. Starring: Alec Baldwin, Anthony Hopkins, Kim Cattrall, Dan Aykroyd, Jennifer Love Hewitt

programme.title: For The Love Of Benji
programme.desc: Benji is back! En route to a vacation in Greece Benji becomes separated from the family in Athens, Benji finds himself on the run from an assortment of international spies seeking an energy scientist, who has been working on a secret formula.

programme.title: Time of the Wolf
programme.desc: After the death of his parents, Aaron has to live on the remote ranch of his distant aunt and uncle. Uncommunicative relatives and the cruelty he suffers from at his new school let him turn to a friendship with a wolf cub orphaned by local farmers.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: In a future where time is literally money and aging stops at 25, the only way to stay alive is to earn, steal, or inherit more time. Will Salas lives minute-to-minute, until a windfall of time gives him access to the world of the wealthy, where he teams up with a beautiful young heiress to destroy the corrupt system.

programme.title: The Final Cut
programme.desc: Welcome to the not-too-distant future, where implanted microchips record every single moment of a person's life. Upon death, it becomes the job of a "cutter" like Alan Hakman (Oscar-winner Robin Williams) to edit down the deceased's entire lifetime into a fitting memorial film. For years, he has used his god-like power of final cut to absolve the dead of a multitude of sins. But when, on his latest assignment, he views a terrible secret that can't be erased, Hakman finds his own life in jeopardy in this riveting science fiction thriller.

programme.title: Encounter
programme.desc: A group of friends make a remarkable discovery in a rural field - a crashed spacecraft - And there's a survivor. But when they bring the otherworldly being home, they soon discover that it holds even greater secrets than they could imagine. But with the government on their tail, time is running out to ascertain the alien's true intentions.

programme.title: The White King
programme.desc: Djata is a care-free 12-year-old growing up in a brutal dictatorship shut off from the outside world. When the government imprisons his father, Peter, and Djata and his mother Hannah are labeled traitors, the boy will not rest until he sees his father again.

programme.title: Sisters of the Groom
programme.desc: Jason ropes his neighbor Sarah into pretending to be his girlfriend for his brother's wedding but his prying sisters suspect something is amiss.

programme.title: Groomzilla
programme.desc: A newly engaged woman makes a wish that her fiancee take the planning of their wedding seriously, and to her surprise and dismay, her wish comes true.

programme.title: Amber's Story
programme.desc: This is the true story of the kidnapping of Amber Hagerman and how her family came together to help other abducted children as a result of her tragedy which resulted in a new system to help find missing children - The Amber Alert.

programme.title: A Man for Every Month
programme.desc: Blogger, Megan, tends to shy away from dating, but that all changes when her boss assigns her to vlog her dates for the eligible bachelor calendar. Now pushed out of her comfort zone, Megan must quickly learn the golden rules of dating.

programme.title: Against the Wild: Survive the Serengeti
programme.desc: Two kids and their dog must use all their skills to survive in the African bush after a plane crash.

programme.title: Listen Out for Love
programme.desc: Peyton Pepper, a goal-driven podcast producer, is forced to mold Alex McKinney, a brash loose cannon, into her next star and create the perfect show to save both of their careers. That show comes in the form of finding Peyton's iconic idol, true love. But as the duo goes along for the ride, they are the ones who find love--once they open their hearts and listen.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Eleanor Rigby
programme.desc: This beautifully honest portrait of love follows the once happily married couple Conor (James McAvoy of X-MEN FRANCHISE, ATONEMENT) and Eleanor (Academy Award®-nominee Jessica Chastain of ZERO DARK THIRTY, THE TREE OF LIFE). After being torn apart by tragedy, the couple find themselves strangers longing to reclaim the passion and life they once shared. This ensemble romance costars Academy Award®-nominee Viola Davis (THE HELP, TV's HOW TO GET AWAY WITH MURDER), Bill Hader (TV's SATURDAY NIGHT LIVE), Academy Award®-winner William Hurt (A HISTORY OF VIOLENCE), and Isabelle Huppert (AMOUR).

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Milo Boyd (Gerard Butler), a down-on-his-luck bounty hunter, gets his dream job when he is assigned to track down his bail-jumping ex-wife, reporter Nicole Hurly (Jennifer Aniston). He thinks all that's ahead is an easy payday, but when Nicole gives him the slip so she can chase a lead on a murder cover-up, Milo realizes that nothing ever goes simply with him and Nicole. The exes continually one-up each other – until they find themselves on the run for their lives. They thought their promise to love, honor and obey was tough – staying alive is going to be a whole lot tougher. Andy Tennant (Hitch, Sweet Home Alabama) directs.

programme.title: Love & Where to Find It
programme.desc: Two local coffee shop business owners despise each other in real life, but fall in love while unknowingly sending each other messages via a dating app on their friends' behalf.

programme.title: The Secret: Dare to Dream
programme.desc: A feature film adaptation of the self-help book, 'The Secret', which focuses on the power of positive thinking

programme.title: Ride Like a Girl
programme.desc: The story of Michelle Payne, the first female jockey to win the Melbourne Cup.

programme.title: Akeelah and the Bee
programme.desc: A young girl from South Los Angeles competes to for a place in the National Spelling Bee.

programme.title: The Secret: Dare to Dream
programme.desc: A feature film adaptation of the self-help book, 'The Secret', which focuses on the power of positive thinking

programme.title: A Mother's Fury
programme.desc: A gripping, tender and thought-provoking thriller written by and starring Siobhan Fallon Hogan (Men in Black) and Robert Patrick (DC's Peacemaker). When a young college student is killed in a fraternity hazing incident, his mother resorts to extreme measures by taking justice into her own hands when she encounters empty promises in Washington, D.C. Directed by Vibeke Muasya (Twisted).

programme.title: Wheeler
programme.desc: An emotional, uplifting drama starring Stephen Dorff (Immortals) and featuring country music legend Kris Kristofferson (Blade). Aspiring musician Wheeler travels to Nashville with the lifelong dream of trying his hand at country music. As Wheeler chases his dream, the line between reality and fiction blurs in this touching and enlightening tribute to old school country legends.

programme.title: Battle for Skyark
programme.desc: Witness the greatest battle for peace, justice and mankind in this fantasy thriller. The earth has been taken over by vicious monsters, and humans have taken refuge in the sky in the city, Skyark. When Skyark starts overcrowding the rich and powerful mercilessly dump the poor and the orphans back to the desolate earth. Among them a boy who is determined to make things right.

programme.title: Guardians of the Tomb
programme.desc: Jumanji meets The Mummy in this edge-of-your-seat action thriller, starring Kelsey Grammer (X-Men), Kellan Lutz (Twilight) and Bingbing Li (Transformers). In a quest to find a lost colleague, a team of scientists find themselves deep underground in an ancient labyrinth, battling Chinese magic and flesh-eating spiders, while trying to unearth a secret that has been buried for centuries.

programme.title: Crash Site: A Family In Danger
programme.desc: A couple must fight for their lives after crashing their jeep. Starring Charisma Carpenter (2011)

programme.title: The Gourmet Detective
programme.desc: After a shocking murder at his friend's restaurant, a culinary expert uses his mastery of food, drink and cooking to solve the case. Stars Dylan Neal, Brooke Burns (2015)

programme.title: A Bride's Nightmare
programme.desc: A bride is kidnapped on the day of her wedding by her fiance's delusional ex-girlfriend. Starring Brittany Underwood (2021)

programme.title: Another Mother
programme.desc: Things turn deadly for a woman after she becomes engaged to a man with a 10-year-old daughter. Starring Alex McKenna (2020)

programme.title: The Birthday Wish
programme.desc: Gwen is turning 30 and is expecting her boyfriend to propose. But when the proposal does not materialise, she makes a birthday wish to take a glimpse into her future. Is it what she envisaged? (2017)

programme.title: One Of A Kind Love
programme.desc: Kyra's dream of becoming a jeweller might come to fruition. Little does she know someone has manifested a life for her too. (2020)

programme.title: Blueprint to the Heart
programme.desc: TV presenter Tiffany reluctantly gives divorcee Brooks a lifestyle makeover for her new show. Can Brooks's charm help raise the show's ratings, or will he raise Tiffany's heart instead? (2020)

programme.title: My Birthday Romance
programme.desc: Callie dreads family dinners as her parents pressure her to find a partner. Help is in the form of Will, her brother's colleague, who will pose as her date. Will her parents be fooled? (2020)
"21" is the fact-based story about six MIT students who were trained to become experts in card counting and subsequently took Vegas casinos for millions in winnings.

programme.title: The Crossing
programme.desc: Based on the historical novel by Howard Fast, THE CROSSING stars Jeff Daniels as George Washington, the revolutionary war general who leads American colonialists in the war against British rule. This telefilm dramatizes Washington's crossing of the Delaware River in 1776, prior to his eventual election as the first president of the United States.

programme.title: Meet Dave
programme.desc: Seeking a way to save their doomed world, a crew of tiny, human-looking aliens arrives on Earth in the perfect disguise--a spaceship shaped like an ordinary man.

programme.title: The Walk
programme.desc: The true story of French high-wire artist Philippe Petit's walk between the Twin Towers of the World Trade Center on August 7, 1974.

programme.title: Blankman
programme.desc: He has no superpowers, no money and no name. He's Blankman, a self-appointed neighborhood crimestopper who's so broke that he fights crime in his underware. Television's Damon Wayans stars as the bumbling Blankman in this uproarious laughfest.

programme.title: Geronimo: An American Legend
programme.desc: A legendary warrior leads the last remaining free Indian tribe against U.S. Army forces intent on their subjugation.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: Human cloning technology has fallen into destructive, corrupt hands but one man refuses to be a pawn in the deadly conspiracy.

programme.title: Armed And Dangerous
programme.desc: Candy is a former police officer who lost his job when he was framed. Levy is a former attorney who has been disbarred for incompetence. Faced with unemployment, both men take jobs as guards for a security company where, after two hours' training, but their employer is frightened of Loggia, the union mob boss who seems to have everyone under his control.

programme.title: Buddy
programme.desc: An eccentric 1920s socialite raises a baby gorilla as her own child.

programme.title: A League Of Their Own (1992)
programme.desc: Daring female athletes win over a skeptical public and lead their team to victory in the WWII-era women's baseball league.

programme.title: Tootsie
programme.desc: An unemployed actor with a reputation for being difficult disguises himself as a woman to get a role in a soap opera.

programme.title: Mixed Nuts
programme.desc: From the director of Sleepless in Seattle, the endearingly off-center employees of a suicide hotline hope for a Christmas miracle.

programme.title: Five Nights in Maine
programme.desc: A man, reeling from the tragic loss of his wife, travels to rural Maine to seek answers from his estranged mother-in-law, who is herself confronting grief. With David Oyelowo and Dianne Wiest.

programme.title: The Healer
programme.desc: As much as Alec yearns to avoid being attributed any healing powers, more bizarre events keep occurring. Alec, in shock, is discovering the family secret he possesses, a gift… the gift of healing, a gift he must accept or reject. The arrival of Abigail, a teenage girl with terminal cancer, wise beyond her years, provides Alec with one last chance to consider his life's purpose.

programme.title: Slipaway
programme.desc: When a homeless young musician moves into a sailboat with a feisty elderly widow, the two must overcome their differences and haunting pasts to unlock each other's dreams.

programme.title: The Boy in the Plastic Bubble
programme.desc: Loving parents Johnny (Robert Reed, TV's “The Brady Bunch”) and Mickey Lubitch (Diana Hyland, TV's “Peyton Place”) learn that their son, Tod (Travolta), is born with an immune deficiency. Forced to live in a self-contained environment, he is unable to have direct contact with anything or anyone in the outside world. Despite being sheltered from society, Tod remains optimistic about life, even developing a relationship with his neighbor, Gina (Glynnis O'Connor, Johnny Dangerously). But all Tod hopes for is to get outside and experience what others take for granted.

programme.title: Proximity
programme.desc: Close Encounters of the Third Kind' meets 'Independence Day'. Earth is in danger and a loner named Isaac holds the key to unravelling the mystery that will expose the truth behind alien abduction. Once an unpopular cog in the machine of life Isaac now finds himself a wanted man but also the only person that stands between human extinction at the hands of an extra-terrestrial threat. An invasion is coming and human life as we know it is about to change forever. A slick UFO thriller with an out-of-this-world twist - a must watch!

programme.title: The Intergalactic Adventures of Max Cloud
programme.desc: When video-game enthusiast, Sarah (Isabelle Allen), is transported into her favorite game, she finds herself on an intergalactic prison, home to the most dangerous villains in the galaxy. The only way to escape the game is to complete it. Teaming up with space hero, Max Cloud (Scott Adkins), Sarah battles the terrifying planet while her best friend, Cowboy, controls the game from her bedroom in Brooklyn. Sit down, plug in, and get ready for a sci-fi adventure like no other.

programme.title: White Vengeance
programme.desc: White Vengeance tells the story of two brothers contending for supremacy during the fall of the Qin Dynasty, which ruled Imperial China from 221 to 206 BC. As rebels rose, the nation fell into chaos. Liu Bang and Xiang Yu, became leaders of the rebellious army, and also became sworn brothers in battle.

programme.title: Warriors' Gate
programme.desc: American teenager Jack Bronson is magically transported to ancient China, where he must become a hero and rescue a beautiful princess from the clutches of the evil barbarian king.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks

Hot Tuna hooks up and heads for home.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: With the quota nearly gone, all the Captains are pushing the limits. Tyler runs aground near the bridge because of low water, while Kahuna trying to catch what might be a final paycheck, only manages a shark. Rasta Rocket makes light work of the turbulent sand bar waves.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: With the blue fin quota extended, all the crews look to take advantage, and fish hard. Drama on Hot Tuna as the bird breaks off, leaving the crew to fight the fish on the greenstick reel alone. Kahuna gets a fake dog mascot, since some other boats with dogs, seem to have good luck.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Extreme weather patterns move into the Outer Banks. Since they are more used to the dangerous conditions, the Southern captains, believe that have an advantage over the Northern boats. The Northern captains need to put Tuna on the deck if they want to beat the Southerners, but everyone must weigh the risk versus the reward.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: A heavy top dollar fish, caught by Zack Shackleford and his young Rasta Rocket crew, might just be a game changer, and puts pressure on the veterans of the fleet. Dave Marciano on Falcon tries trolling to catch more fish. Reel E Bugging steps up their effort.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: The Northern fleet are not going down without a fight, but the Southern fleet battles on to keep the lead. Some boats are taking risks and changing tactics, because they know that all it will take is one good sized fish to shake up the leader board.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Pamuzinda Safari Lodge is only one and a half hours from the capital - Harare. With Lawrence as her guide, Kristina embarks on an entertaining horse-back safari, interacts with Jasmine the giraffe, has a relaxing canoe trip and meets the clever resident elephant herd.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.sub-title: Imire Rhino and Wild Life Conservancy
programme.desc: Kristina visits Imire Rhino and Wildlife Conservancy where she is shown around by the founder's grandson, Riley. She has the opportunity to learn about and interact with elephants that have been trained to track poachers. They track a black rhino and her calf on foot and Riley puts her skills as an anti-poacher to the test.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: The adventure continues as Kristina journeys to Far and Wide in mountainous Nyanga, Eastern Zimbabwe. Her guide Bernie begins the trip with some extreme adventure sports including braving the tallest zip line on the planet. She tackles obstacle courses, is taught wilderness survival skills and heads to a nearby reserve to photograph diverse animal species for her personal wildlife calendar.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina visits Thetford Estate where she's treated to amazing photographic opportunities for her personal calendar. Her guide, Craig Coid, gets her closer to white rhino than she ever imagined and takes her way back in time as he tells stories revealed by detailed rock paintings.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina travels back to Zimbabwe's stunning lake Kariba. This time she's touring the area on the luxurious Karabezi Houseboat Cruiser. Joined by fishing experts, Craig and Mark, she attempts to catch the infamous tiger fish. The shoreline sights never disappoint as she witnesses lion and fish eagles on the hunt. Kristina challenges her fishing guide, Dollar, to a fishing competition and lands her biggest fish yet!

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Upon arrival in Zimbabwe, Kristina Guberman heads to Hwange National Park - renowned for it's impressive elephant herds. She learns about these gentle giants, encounters cheetah on foot and chances upon a cheetah hunt with her guide, David.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina travels to the Mana Pools National Park with guide Craig van Zyl. They come across mating lions, have close encounters with bull elephants and canoe just meters away from imposing hippos and crocodiles on the mighty Zambezi River.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Wildlife guide, Craig accompanies Kristina to one of the wildest places in Zimbabwe – Chitake Springs, aka, Ambush Alley. They get up close to a huge bull elephant and Kristina has her first-ever sighting of endangered wild dogs.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina gets to tick off one of her bucket list dreams – the majestic Victoria Falls. Her guide Beano walks her through the history of the falls formation and they encounter some of the wildlife that live in the surrounding area. She zip-lines across the gorge and learns the integral role vultures play in the ecosystem.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Still at Victoria Falls, Kristina is treated to an aerial view of the Victoria falls. She gets up close and personal with prehistoric-looking beasts at the croc sanctuary, experiences some of the must-do tourist activities and has her first-ever encounter with endangered black rhino at the Stanley and Livingstone Private Game Reserve.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Guided by Sean, Kristina explores the Matusadona National Park where they have incredible on-foot encounters with elephants and lions. Will she keep her cool as she comes face-to-face with one of Africa's apex predators?

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina remains at Changa where she is treated to game-viewing by helicopter, tries her hand at fishing and witnesses lions stalking buffalo.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Pamuzinda Safari Lodge is only one and a half hours from the capital - Harare. With Lawrence as her guide, Kristina embarks on an entertaining horse-back safari, interacts with Jasmine the giraffe, has a relaxing canoe trip and meets the clever resident elephant herd.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.sub-title: Imire Rhino and Wild Life Conservancy
programme.desc: Kristina visits Imire Rhino and Wildlife Conservancy where she is shown around by the founder's grandson, Riley. She has the opportunity to learn about and interact with elephants that have been trained to track poachers. They track a black rhino and her calf on foot and Riley puts her skills as an anti-poacher to the test.

programme.title: The Oceans Seven
programme.desc: André Wiersig, born in 1972, has achieved what no German has ever done before: he has swum through the world's seven most famous straits, the so-called Ocean's Seven. To prepare for it, he chose a familiar but hostile environment. In his carport, he hardened himself in a rain barrel filled with groundwater.

programme.title: Wild Baltic: Wild Baltic
programme.desc: The first episode of this two-part nature documentary presents the natural beauty of the shifting sand dunes of the Curonian Spit, the romantic beaches of the Latvian Baltic Sea and the island worlds of Estonia. Time and again, this deserted and almost untouched nature fascinates. In the winter, ringed seals give birth to their young on the pack ice. In the spring, Konik wild horse stallions fight fierce battles amongst themselves, while colourful European rollers fly through the dune forests. Lynxes wander through the coastal forests and in the orchid meadows turncoats and hoopoes find more than enough food. On the islands around Saaremaa in Estonia, grey seals hunt for fish. They share the archipelago with Europe's largest tern, the Caspian tern.

programme.title: Wild Baltic: Wild Baltic
programme.desc: The wide, often untouched wilderness of the Baltic hinterland is home to many animals. More than 35 brown bears live in the primeval forests of Alutaguse. In the spring, the Soomaa National Park transforms into a huge lake. Europe's widest waterfall is located in Latvia. In the beginning of May, vimba bream follow the course of the River Venta. The hardly 5-centimetre-long fish have to overcome a 4-metre-long rock barrier in order to reach their spawning grounds.

programme.title: Europe's far North
programme.desc: Lofoten is the rugged archipelago in the Norwegian Arctic Ocean. Whoever arrives here is really at the end. Moskenes is the end of the line, and anyone who wants to go further needs a boat or a plane. The only way to get to the open sea is via the Maelstrom, which is quite dangerous. On the outermost headland, there are only a few ruins left. The last inhabitants are long gone, a supply was hardly possible. But fishermen are on the way, mainly to catch cod. And there is the coastal administration, which takes care of broken sea marks and lighthouses. A visit to one of the luxurious ships of the Hurtig Line is not to be missed. They shuttle off rough coasts on an eleven-day trip between the Russian border and southern Norway. A floating workplace for a wide variety of professions. The island of Andøya is not served by the Hurtiglinie. It lies too far out in the Atlantic. One of the most important observatories in Europe is located here. A young woman, Sandra Blindheim, is the boss. She is responsible for the large laser that delivers important information to scientists around the world. On clear winter nights, there is a wonderful panoramic view of the aurora borealis.

programme.title: Giants of Fortune
programme.desc: In the little Filipino village of Oslob on the Cebu Island, people suffer from typhoons and overfishing. Until the world's biggest fish and the Internet change everything.Fisherman Zosimo's dearest wish is for his children to graduate from high school one day. Yet the chance that this wish will come true is tiny, since at times Zosimo doesn't even manage to feed the family. Typhoons and overfishing make the lives of Oslob fishermen difficult.

programme.title: mareTV: Madeira
programme.sub-title: Portugal's sea of blossoms in the Atlantic Ocean
programme.desc: Flower magic in Madeira: The Flower Festival Festa da Flor is the most important event of the year for the people of the Atlantic island. With it they celebrate spring, which is climatically practically all year round here, their island and themselves. The coast formed by lava, centuries-old laurel forests and green steep slopes make Madeira unique. Those who start right at the front of the big parade of the flower festival in the capital Funchal, will have made it. For Isabel Borges this dream has come true. She opens this year's flower parade along the harbour promenade with her festive group. This accolade does not only mean fame and prestige, but also a lot of pressure. Are the self-designed dresses splendid enough? Will the 150 flower children learn the dance steps in time? Will the flowers on the float hold out in the heat? For Isabel, it is now a matter of nerves.

programme.title: Mysterious Oceanic Oases
programme.desc: Countless marine animals frolic on the steep slopes of underwater volcanoes. In many cases, several are rare species not found elsewhere. This is in part due to the fact that plankton clings to the wall and provides the fish with food in abundance. This documentary shows several of these oases and also examines the impact dive tourism has and whether preventive measures can help to maintain them. Nature and underwater filmmaker Rolf Möltgen undertakes dives into the mysterious underwater mountain landscapes with marine scientists from all corners of the globe. This journey takes us to Mexico, to snappers, white-tip reef sharks, Galapagos sharks and giant mantas. We visit the Maldives, Colombia and Costa Rica, where the team documents rare species such as deep sea burbots, small tooth sand tiger and dogfish sharks, in depths of more than 3 metres. The eerie underwater mountain world proves: everyone plays a part in the network of life. Thanks to consistent protective regulations, it has been possible to retain the underwater diversity - especially in the unique oases of the high seas

programme.title: Wildlife Diaries Australia: Of Fairy Penguins and GPS Trackers
programme.desc: Australia's largest fur seal colony is located on Phillip Island. Night after night, a breathtaking spectacle takes place here: At sunset, countless fairy penguins return from their hunt for fish. In the station near the penguin colony, pioneering scientific research is conducted around the cute animals. We learn how dedicated scientists are trying to secure the future of the fairy penguins with the help of GPS trackers.

programme.desc: The wildlife team almost ends up in the jaws of a hippo after they try and help an injured bull. We capture some rare footage of the cheetah cubs as their mother teaches them to hunt by using a baby antelope as bait.

programme.title: Life Stories
programme.desc: Taking care of one's children is the most marvellous job around. It's also the hardest job in the world. There are times when you can almost understand that some animals don't take care of their offspring at all.

programme.title: Life Stories
programme.desc: The tranquillity of Nature is just a façade. Living means struggling and fighting. It means winning and losing many battles, both big and small. This struggle affects everyone and everything: fights over food, over territory… or for love.

programme.title: Life Stories
programme.desc: During their lives, animals spend tons of time taking care of their personal appearance. They scratch, lick, powder themselves, or comb their feathers and take baths for hours, every day. These are the animals 'Dressing for Life'.

programme.title: Islands
programme.desc: Many species arrive on islands by mistake. It can place these animals in a land of opportunity, but it can also become a prison. Space, food and water are limited resources, and so island creatures evolve to make the most of their surroundings.

programme.title: Islands
programme.desc: Animals that find themselves stranded on islands must adapt quickly, finding newchallenges, but also rewarding niches. For the bold and adaptable, island sanctuaries are lands of immense opportunity.

programme.title: The Great Penguin Rescue
programme.desc: Michael needs to face her fears now and learn the critical task of hand feeding young birds. If she doesn't, they will certainly die. But can she master the task in time?
